PETITION RE SUBSTITUTED JUDGMENT TRUST
Off Calendar Jun-19-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Stephen Dale for Bruce Buerstatte.

Mr. Dale presented oral argument to support his position. The Petition for Substituted Judgment was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Nancy Bautista/ Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.
